notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC + verifier-v1 artifacts reused from C3 dgfp-1-rep1 (POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec). Single predicate isBusyDelayCall recognises mdelay() with millisecond arg >= 10; sleepable/atomic context tests inlined in assembly where-clause. final.ql compiles and fires 4x on POC (buggy + tp1/tp2/tp3), silent on _fixed/tn*/fp*.
